text:
Disease: Ringworm
Symptoms: itchy patches, circular lesions, hair loss, crusty skin around eyes, face, neck
Body parts: eye, face, skin
Cause: fungal infection (dermatophytes)
Treatment: antifungal ointments, isolation
Prevention: hygiene, dry environment, disinfect equipment
Keywords: goat itchy skin, patches near eye, fungal infection

Disease: Abscess
Symptoms: swelling, pus-filled lump, boil-like lesion, pain on touch
Body parts: skin, neck, body
Cause: bacterial infection from wounds
Treatment: drainage, antibiotics
Prevention: clean wounds, hygiene
Keywords: goat swelling lump, pus lesion

Disease: Ulcerative Mouth Lesion
Symptoms: sores, scabs, crusty lesions around mouth, difficulty eating
Body parts: mouth, lips
Cause: viral infection
Treatment: antiseptic care, supportive treatment
Prevention: vaccination, isolate infected animals
Keywords: goat mouth sores, lip infection

Disease: Foot Rot
Symptoms: limping, foul smell from hoof, swelling in foot, lameness
Body parts: hoof, legs
Cause: bacterial infection in wet conditions
Treatment: hoof trimming, antibiotics, foot baths
Prevention: dry housing, foot hygiene
Keywords: goat limping, hoof infection

Disease: Sheep Pox
Symptoms: fever, skin lesions, scabs, weakness
Body parts: skin, body
Cause: viral infection
Treatment: supportive care
Prevention: vaccination, quarantine
Keywords: sheep fever skin lesions

Disease: Goat Pox
Symptoms: fever, nodules on skin, scabs, respiratory distress
Body parts: skin, lungs
Cause: viral infection
Treatment: supportive care
Prevention: vaccination
Keywords: goat skin nodules, fever

Disease: Mastitis
Symptoms: swollen udder, pain, abnormal milk, fever
Body parts: udder
Cause: bacterial infection
Treatment: antibiotics, udder hygiene
Prevention: clean milking practices
Keywords: goat udder swelling, milk infection

Disease: Enterotoxemia
Symptoms: sudden death, diarrhea, abdominal pain
Body parts: intestine
Cause: bacterial toxin (Clostridium)
Treatment: emergency care
Prevention: vaccination
Keywords: goat sudden death, diarrhea

Disease: PPR (Peste des Petits Ruminants)
Symptoms: fever, nasal discharge, diarrhea, mouth lesions
Body parts: respiratory, digestive
Cause: viral infection
Treatment: supportive care
Prevention: vaccination
Keywords: goat fever diarrhea nasal discharge

Disease: Orf
Symptoms: scabby lesions on lips, mouth, udder
Body parts: mouth, udder
Cause: viral infection
Treatment: antiseptic care
Prevention: hygiene
Keywords: goat mouth scabs

Disease: Pink Eye
Symptoms: redness, tearing, eye discharge, cloudiness
Body parts: eye
Cause: bacterial infection
Treatment: antibiotic eye drops
Prevention: reduce dust
Keywords: goat eye infection, watery eyes

Cause: parasite
Treatment: anticoccidial drugs
Prevention: clean environment
Keywords: goat diarrhea parasite

Cause: worms
Treatment: deworming
Prevention: pasture management
Keywords: goat worms, weakness

Treatment: insecticide
Prevention: hygiene
Keywords: goat itching skin

Cause: mites
Treatment: acaricides
Prevention: isolation
Keywords: goat itchy skin mange

Disease: Diarrhea

Cause: infection or diet

Prevention: proper feeding
Keywords: goat loose motion

Disease: Pneumonia

Treatment: antibiotics
Prevention: ventilation

Disease: Bloat

Cause: gas accumulation
Treatment: release gas
Prevention: proper diet
Keywords: goat stomach swelling

Disease: Anthrax
Symptoms: sudden death, bleeding from openings
Body parts: whole body
Cause: bacteria
Treatment: not usually possible
Prevention: vaccination
Keywords: sudden death goat

Disease: Rabies

Cause: virus
Treatment: none
Prevention: vaccination
Keywords: goat abnormal behavior

Keywords: goat stiff body

Disease: Brucellosis

Cause: bacteria

Prevention: vaccination
Keywords: goat abortion disease

Disease: Ketosis
Symptoms: weakness, reduced appetite

Cause: energy imbalance

Prevention: balanced diet
Keywords: goat weakness metabolism

Cause: calcium deficiency

Prevention: diet control
Keywords: goat cannot stand
